MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Melvin C. Beli, Esq. for plaintiff Value Home Loan, Inc with authorized agent, Kurt Montufar present.
Teresa Lynn Friend, Esq. for defendant Richard Mayer, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, which is then filed. Trial date vacated.

JPT: Alexander Anolik, Clerks Clark Banayad / Marsha Smith, not reported (218)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Set Aside Default Judgment And To Recall Wirt Of Possession;
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RICHARD MAYER'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Possession. Appearances: Lisa Walco, Esq. of the Law Offices of Fred M. Szkolnik, (818) 986-3888, (appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Plaintiff Value Home Loan, (appearing for clarification, and not opposing motion); Teresa Lynn Friend, Esq., of the Homeless Advocacy Project, (415) 865-9203, appearing for Defendant, Richard Mayer and moving party. The Court adopted and Amended its tentative ruling. Defendant Richard Mayer's Motion to set aside Default Judgment and to recall writ of possession is Granted. Also, the Court sets aside the default that was entered against defendant. Answer must be filed forthwith. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
